news.headline: Expert Systems advances development of potential one-time influenza treatment, tivoxavir marboxil, marking a key milestone.
news.summary: Celebrating a significant achievement in drug discovery, Expert Systems, headquartered in Rockville, Maryland, announced on October 10, 2024, their progress with tivoxavir marboxil. This potential top-tier inhibitor of the widely-present influenza virus marks a crucial advancement in combining human and artificial intelligence for faster drug development. The company's innovative approach aims to revolutionize the pharmaceutical industry by leveraging cutting-edge technology to enhance the efficiency of drug discovery processes.

news.headline: Asian OEMs are leading in-house R&D of software-defined vehicles as industry shifts to software approach. Report provides benchmark analysis through 2024 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A new report titled "Benchmarking Asian OEMs Software-defined Vehicle Strategies, 2024" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report highlights a shift in the automotive industry towards software-focused vehicle construction. Modern vehicles now contain more software code compared to previous models, reflecting a move from hardware-centric to software-centric design. The rise of software-defined vehicles (SDVs) is influencing how products are developed and features are incorporated. This trend is significantly impacting the industry's approach, with a focus on emerging technologies and digital innovations.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee not concerned about slight inflation uptick, economists firm on Nov rate cut. CPI at 2.4%, experts attribute jobless claims surge to temp disruptions.
news.summary: The September Consumer Price Index (CPI) report showed a slight increase in headline inflation, with CPI rising by 2.4% from a year earlier, surpassing expectations. Core inflation, excluding volatile food and energy prices, unexpectedly rose to 3.3%. Despite this, the market narrative remains focused on cooling price pressures and a softening labor market. Jobless claims in the U.S. jumped to 258,000, though experts attribute this to temporary disruptions rather than underlying labor market weaknesses. Economists still anticipate a potential interest rate cut in November, as the broader trend of disinflation persists. Austan Goolsbee of the Chicago Federal Reserve Bank emphasized that inflation has decreased significantly over the past 12-18 months, noting that the job market has also cooled to a level around full employment.

news.headline: Micron's stock rises as AMD event showcases memory's crucial role; stock gains X% (Source: financial news platform)
Medica donates $1.35 million to Washburn Center for Children in Minn for school-based mental health programs.
news.summary: A donation of $1.35 million has been provided by Medica to Washburn Center for Children in Minnetonka, Minnesota. The funds have been allocated to bolster the center's school-based mental health initiatives.

news.headline: Numeric secures $28M in Series A funding led by Menlo Ventures, involving IVP and Socii Capital, continuing their financial data platform development.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 10, 2024, Numeric announced a successful fundraising endeavor, securing a substantial $28 million in their Series A round. The funding was spearheaded by Menlo Ventures and also saw contributions from new investors IVP and Socii Capital. Existing investors like Founders Fund, 8VC, Long Journey, Access Industries, and Friends & Family Capital also participated in the round, indicating strong support from the company's stakeholders.

news.headline: China's connected truck telematics market set to grow from 2024-2030, with focus on commercial trucks. Report includes data on total installed base of telematics and historical data from 2021.
news.summary: A new report titled "Growth Opportunities in the Connected Truck Telematics Market, China, 2024-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report delves into the telematics industry in China, particularly in relation to commercial trucks. It covers data on the total installed base of telematics, which represents the number of commercial trucks utilizing such systems. The report includes historical data from 2021 and serves as a valuable resource for industry analysis in China.

news.headline: Sheppard Pratt appoints Jennifer Coyne as General Counsel, with over 25 years of healthcare law experience.
news.summary: Sheppard Pratt in Baltimore has recently appointed Jennifer Coyne, JD, as their new general counsel. Coyne, who previously worked as principal at Miles & Stockbridge P.C., brings more than 25 years of expertise in healthcare law to the role.

news.headline: TD Bank fined $3 billion for money laundering, largest-ever penalty by US officials on a bank. Regulators impose cap on new deposits.
news.summary: U.S. authorities have levied the largest penalty on a bank for breaching anti-money laundering regulations. The unprecedented penalty amount is the highest ever imposed on a bank for such violations. Additionally, regulators have placed limitations on TD's capacity to take in new deposits as a result of this enforcement action.

news.headline: 68 counterparties take $322.587b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Nasdaq rebounds despite inflation, ADMA Biologics plunges on accounting worries; 2.4% rise in consumer prices in Sept.
news.summary: There was a significant impact on small caps, with U.S. consumer prices increasing by 2.4% in September. Despite this, the Nasdaq managed to turn positive. Additionally, the top IBD 50 stock, ADMA Biologics, experienced a crash due to accounting concerns. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: IMLS deadline for grants supporting American Latino history is Nov. 15. Small museums and universities encouraged to apply.
news.summary: In light of Hispanic Heritage month, the Institute of Museum and Library Services (IMLS) is calling on small museums, cultural institutions, and university partners to submit applications. This initiative, announced on October 10, 2024, aims to support these organizations in their educational and preservation efforts. Interested parties are encouraged to apply to benefit from this program.

news.headline: Future 6G networks could be powered by spectrum in the 7-8 GHz range for increased connectivity. 5G Americas white paper explores potential with speeds and capacity.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, plans for the next wave of wireless technology are underway with the identification of the 7.125 – 8.400 GHz spectrum as vital for future connectivity. 5G Americas, serving as the leading advocate for 5G and future technologies in the Americas, has released a new white paper titled ‘The 6G Upgrade in the 7-8 GHz Spectrum Range: Coverage, Capacity, and Technology.’ This paper explores the potential of the 7-8 GHz spectrum range in enhancing connectivity, offering exceptional capacity, and high-speed communication capabilities for future networks.

news.headline: Analyst predicts Trump and Harris to avoid changing entitlements.
Paired Power appoints Sam Valles as Head of Manufacturing & Production, bringing 25 years of experience in the field.
news.summary: In Campbell, California, Paired Power, a prominent provider of advanced solar-powered electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions like PairTree™ and PairFleet™ microgrid solar EV charging stations, has appointed Sam Valles as the Head of Manufacturing and Production. With more than 25 years of expertise in manufacturing, engineering, logistics, and product development, Valles is known for spearheading growth and enhancing process efficiency. This strategic move aims to further strengthen Paired Power's position in the market.

news.headline: Nutrien (NTR) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 6 after market close. Conference call on Nov 7 at 10 am EST. Dial 1-888-870-4559 or 647-931-1822.
news.summary: Nutrien Ltd. is set to reveal its third quarter 2024 results on November 6, following the market close. A conference call discussing the outcomes and future prospects is scheduled for November 7 at 10:00 a.m. EST. To participate, investors can dial 1-888-870-4559 or 647-931-1822. Alternatively, a webcast of the call will be available on Nutrien’s Investor Events and Presentation page. A replay of the call will also be provided for those unable to attend.

news.headline: India emerging as global AI leader driven by gov't initiatives, corporate investments, skilled youth population.
news.summary: As of October 10, 2024, India is positioning itself as a prominent player in the global artificial intelligence (AI) landscape. This growth is propelled by government backing, significant corporate funding, and a sizable pool of talented young individuals. India's emphasis on AI development is reinforced by well-planned strategies and the active involvement of major companies.

news.headline: Batteries Plus secures signings for 16 new franchise locations in Q3, showing continued growth. #BatteryFranchise #Expansion
news.summary: The dominant specialty battery franchise in the nation, Batteries Plus, is experiencing substantial expansion in vital U.S. regions due to its strong franchise model. As of October 10, 2024, the franchise is sustaining impressive growth, demonstrating its strength in the market.

news.headline: Elon Musk to unveil Tesla's 'Robotaxi', set to boost stock market value. Skepticism surrounds feasibility. #autonomousvehicles #technology
news.summary: Elon Musk recently shared that the new vehicle could potentially increase Tesla's stock market value by trillions. However, some experts doubt the feasibility of these cars being used for passenger transportation in the near future.

news.headline: Financial Dwellings and Calque partner in Austin, Texas to offer buy-before-you-sell programs for home buyers.
news.summary: In Texas, homeowners now have the option to make non-contingent offers on their future properties thanks to a loan product offered by Financial Dwellings in collaboration with Calque. This initiative provides homeowners with more flexibility in their real estate transactions, allowing them to bypass certain contingencies typically required in home purchases. This innovative offering aims to streamline the buying process and empower homeowners with greater control over their property acquisitions.

news.headline: Hiperbaric invests €4 million to expand facility in Burgos, Spain, celebrating 25 years as global high-pressure tech leader.
news.summary: A top player in high-pressure technology, Hiperbaric, based in BURGOS, Spain, marked its 25th year with a major investment and technological progress. The company, renowned for its high-pressure processing equipment, celebrated its milestone anniversary on Oct. 10, 2024.

news.headline: Nvidia's Blackwell AI processors are sold out for next 12 months due to high demand.
news.summary: Nvidia has announced that their upcoming artificial intelligence processors, known as Blackwell, have completely sold out for the next year. These highly anticipated processors have generated significant demand, leading to all inventory being reserved for the next 12 months. This news reflects the strong interest in Nvidia's cutting-edge technology, with the company experiencing overwhelming pre-orders for the Blackwell AI processors. No units will be available for purchase for the next year due to the high level of demand.

news.headline: Pfizer stock falls as former execs side with drugmaker over activist investor Starboard, citing coercion.
news.summary: The stock of Pfizer experienced a decline on Thursday following the decision of former executives Ian Read and Frank D'Amelio to support the pharmaceutical company over activist investor Starboard. The disagreement led to a drop in Pfizer's stock value. The activist investor Starboard claimed that the executives were coerced into their decision, which caused a stir in the market. This event underscores the ongoing conflicts within the company, with significant implications for its financial performance and shareholder relations.

news.headline: Investors await Tesla's robotaxi event cautiously with stock near buy point. Stay tuned for live coverage.
news.summary: Investors are proceeding cautiously ahead of the upcoming robotaxi event tonight. The event, showcasing Tesla's latest innovation, is anticipated to attract significant attention. The post on Investor's Business Daily indicates that Tesla's stock is approaching a potential buy point, indicating a positive sentiment in the market towards the company. This event is expected to offer valuable insights into Tesla's future prospects and could impact its stock performance.

news.headline: Moderna stock fell post light 2025 sales outlook & cut 2027 R&D budget. Question arises if MRNA stock is a sell.
news.summary: Following a modest sales outlook for 2025 and a reduction in their R&D budget for 2027, Moderna's stock experienced a decline. This has raised concerns among investors about whether MRNA stock should be sold off.

news.headline: Delta Air Lines' revenue was strong, but guidance disappointed. Hurricane Milton impacted 600 flights. Delta stock nearly at a buy point.
news.summary: Despite Delta Air Lines reporting higher revenue than expected, their guidance for the future fell short of investor expectations. As a result, Delta stock initially dropped but later recovered near a potential buy point. The disappointing guidance was influenced by various factors, including the upcoming U.S. elections and the impact of Hurricane Milton, which forced the cancellation of 600 flights.

news.headline: FDA approved Eli Lilly's new eczema drug, raising interest in Eli Lilly stock as a potential buy option - details on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Eli Lilly has received approval from the Food and Drug Administration for a new eczema drug. This development has sparked discussions about whether investing in Eli Lilly stock would be a wise decision at this time. The approval of the eczema drug is seen as a positive milestone for the company, potentially leading to increased sales and market growth. Investors are now weighing the potential impact of this new drug on Eli Lilly's stock value.

news.headline: SEC files lawsuit against Cumberland for allegedly selling securities, including Solana and Polygon. Sues firm again.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) intensified its enforcement actions in the cryptocurrency space by filing charges against Cumberland. The agency reiterated its stance on classifying assets like Solana as securities. This latest move adds to the growing number of regulatory actions taken by the SEC in the crypto industry. This development comes as part of the SEC's ongoing efforts to regulate digital assets and protect investors in this rapidly evolving market.

news.headline: New dating app Laguna uses AI to predict relationship success, addressing common user frustrations.
news.summary: In New York on October 10, 2024, Laguna, an AI-powered matchmaking app, is revolutionizing online dating by addressing common user frustrations. The app blends sophisticated psychology research with state-of-the-art technology to provide a unique experience. This development signifies a significant advancement in the online dating realm, with Laguna offering a solution to longstanding challenges faced by users.

news.headline: Alchemy Pay adds Samsung Pay integration to Crypto Virtual Card, enhancing user experience.
news.summary: Alchemy Pay, a prominent fiat-to-crypto payment gateway based in Singapore, revealed a recent update to its Virtual Card service on October 10, 2024. The update includes integration with Samsung Pay on one of its virtual cards, enhancing the experience for users. This development expands the capabilities of Alchemy Pay's Virtual Card holders, providing them with quick and convenient access to their funds.

news.headline: Lummus Technology named Licensor of the Year for portfolio expansion, technology leadership.
news.summary: Lummus Technology, a worldwide provider of process technologies and energy solutions, was recently honored for its portfolio growth, technological leadership, and significant impact on the industry by a prominent industry media organization. The awards were presented on October 10, 2024, in Houston. This recognition underscores Lummus's commitment to innovation and successful expansion strategies. The company's influence and achievements were acknowledged through the reception of two prestigious awards, highlighting its pioneering approach and industry contributions.

news.headline: Vast reveals final Haven-1 space station design in Long Beach, showcasing cutting-edge features for global collaboration in low-Earth orbit.
news.summary: Vast, a US space habitation technology company, has revealed the interior design of Haven-1, the world's first commercial space station located in low-Earth orbit (LEO). The station offers advanced facilities for scientific research, technological advancement, and global collaboration. This groundbreaking initiative marks a significant step towards long-term living and working in space.

news.headline: Orange announces successful consent solicitation on outstanding notes, with significant participation from bondholders.
US 30 Yr Auction

Subaru reveals pricing for 2025 Crosstrek, offering Premium with 2.5-liter engine, Wilderness model with 9.3" ground clearance, 3,500-lb towing capacity, and 11.6" Multimedia Plus system.SharedPointer Driver Assist.
news.summary: The Crosstrek Premium now includes a standard 2.5-liter, 182-hp SUBARU BOXER® engine. The rugged Crosstrek Wilderness model has returned with enhancements such as upgraded suspension, 9.3-inch ground clearance, and an increased towing capacity of 3,500 lbs. It offers the SUBARU STARLINK® 11.6-inch Multimedia Plus system. Additionally, the Subaru EyeSight® Driver Assist system has been upgraded.

news.headline: Westat awarded contract to conduct MEPS-HC for AHRQ, supporting goal to improve healthcare. AHRQ based in Rockville, Md.
news.summary: Westat is proud to announce its ongoing collaboration with AHRQ in leading the MEPS-HC, a crucial aspect of AHRQ's goal to generate healthcare evidence for enhanced safety, quality, accessibility, equity, and affordability. The partnership will continue in ROCKVILLE, Md., as of October 10, 2024. This initiative exemplifies Westat and AHRQ's commitment to fostering improvements in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: 12 local organizations to get $900,000 in grants for environmental projects. PG&E supports climate action with key investments.
news.summary: PG&E and The PG&E Corporation Foundation are providing grants to support climate action initiatives in local communities. This program is aiming to address the impacts of wildfires, unseasonable heat in the western region, and destructive hurricanes in the southeastern area. The grants are part of a commitment to combat the challenges posed by climate change. The initiative, based in Oakland, California, was launched on October 10, 2024. This effort is crucial in dealing with the increasing climate-related incidents and ensuring the resilience of communities.

news.headline: Las Vegas Sands & HACU select 13 scholarship recipients for hospitality students in Las Vegas and Dallas-Fort Worth.
news.summary: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS) has collaborated with HACU to introduce the Sands Hospitality Advancement Scholarships for hospitality students at Hispanic-serving institutions in Las Vegas and the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area. The initiative, announced on October 10, 2024, aims to support the education of students in the hospitality sector. The scholarships are part of the company's commitment to the community and will benefit a significant number of students pursuing careers in hospitality in these regions. The partnership underscores the importance of investing in the next generation of industry professionals.

news.headline: Community Gaming partners with Moonton for Mobile Legends: Bang Bang esports. CG organizers gain access to exclusive MLBB benefits like Tournament Mode and economic incentives.
news.summary: The esports platform Community Gaming has introduced new features for tournament organizers, offering exclusive benefits for Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) competitions. These perks include the highly desired Tournament Mode and economic incentives. This update was announced on October 10, 2024 in New York, showcasing CG's commitment to enhancing the esports experience. Organizers now have access to specialized tools to elevate their events, attracting more participants and enhancing the overall gaming ecosystem. This move represents CG's dedication to supporting the growth of esports and fostering a competitive yet rewarding environment.

news.headline: Jeep® and Mopar's program awards scholarships to Native American students Carl Cuthair and Camron Slaton, up to $20,000.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on October 10, 2024, it was announced that two Native American students were awarded scholarships. Carl Cuthair from San Juan College in Farmington, New Mexico, and Camron Slaton from Oklahoma State University Institute of Technology in Okmulgee, Oklahoma, were recipients. Both students were granted scholarships worth up to $20,000 in total.

news.headline: FDA approves iota Biosciences' bladder device study by Astellas Pharma's subsidiary; First-in-Human Early Feasibility Study.
news.summary: Today, in Alameda, California, iota Biosciences, Inc., a subsidiary of Astellas Pharma Inc. (TSE: 4503) disclosed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has given the approval for its Investigational Device. The President and CEO of Astellas, Naoki Okamura, expressed the company's excitement about this development.

news.headline: NBA stars Keegan and Kris Murray partner with Brightn for youth mental health, introducing AI journaling feature on World Mental Health Day.
news.summary: A collaboration was inaugurated on World Mental Health Day, debuting an innovative AI-assisted journaling capability. Brightn, a leading AI-based mental health technology provider, revealed the partnership in Cedar Rapids, Iowa on October 10, 2024. This new feature aims to enhance mental well-being through advanced technology.

news.headline: US 30-Year Bond Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.500 (Forecast -, Previous 2.380)
Leipurin, a subsidiary of Aspo Plc, completes the divestment of its Russian operations on October 10, 2024.
news.summary: As of October 10, 2024, at 8:00 pm, Aspo Plc announced that its subsidiary, Leipurin, has successfully concluded the sale of its operations in Russia. This strategic move involves a significant divestment from the company's portfolio.

news.headline: Cyrq Energy appoints Mark Sudbey as CEO, replacing Chip Schneider. Sudbey previously managed $2 billion annual revenue at Alpha Generation.
news.summary: Today, Cyrq Energy has appointed Mark Sudbey as its new Chief Executive Officer (CEO). Sudbey, a seasoned industry executive, previously led Alpha Generation and oversaw a domestic power portfolio generating almost $2 billion in annual revenue. Chip Schneider, who served as interim CEO, will resume his position as Chief Financial Officer and take on the role of President at Cyrq. Sudbey's extensive experience in managing energy infrastructure companies makes him a valuable addition to the leadership team at Cyrq.

news.headline: US 30-Year Bond High Yield Actual 4.389% (Forecast -, Previous 4.015%)
Tips to prevent cold and flu during season - even mild sniffles can disrupt daily life. Stay vigilant against germs.
news.summary: In Mission, Kansas on October 10, 2024, a press release highlighted by PRNewswire emphasized the ease with which cold and flu symptoms can disrupt daily routines. The article discusses how even a minor case of the sniffles can significantly impact one's ability to manage daily responsibilities. While it is challenging to completely evade germs, there are strategies to cope with cold and flu symptoms effectively.

news.headline: Origin Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: OBK) plans to release Q3 2024 results on 10/23/24 after market close and hold conference call on 10/24/24 at 8:00am CT.
news.summary: RUSTON, Louisiana - Origin Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: OBK), the parent company of Origin Bank, is set to release its third quarter 2024 financial results on October 23, 2024, after the market closes. A conference call to discuss the results will take place on October 24, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET). The call will be led by Drake Mills, Chairman, President, and CEO of Origin, William J. Wallace, IV, CFO of Origin, and Lance Hall, President and CEO of Origin Bank.

news.headline: Treasury WI 30 Yr yield 4.404% before $22 billion auction.
Save A Lot introduces loyalty program 'Save A Lot Rewards' nationwide, offering points for shoppers to redeem for rewards.
news.summary: In St. Louis, Save A Lot, a major discount grocery chain, has launched its inaugural loyalty program, Save A Lot Rewards. Through a mobile app, customers can now earn points, referred to as "dots," that can be exchanged for rewards at Save A Lot stores. While individual Save A Lot Retail Partners will have the option to tailor the app to showcase local deals, the national loyalty program will grant shoppers dots for their purchases. This initiative showcases the company's commitment to enhancing customer loyalty and engagement through personalized rewards.
